<!-- CONTEXT: Active Projects / 🔥 PRIORITY 1: System Infrastructure (OPERATIONAL) -->
## 🔥 PRIORITY 1: System Infrastructure (OPERATIONAL)

**Status:** Major upgrade completed 2026-06-10

<!-- CONTEXT: Active Projects / What Was Done Today: -->
### What Was Done Today:
- **Qdrant Brain**: Hybrid search (BGE-small + Splade) operational. 28 namespaces, ~14,183 vectors
- **DaVinci Resolve MCP**: Connected via `davinci-resolve-mcp` in `mcp_config.json` (328 granular tools)
- **Content Engine MCP**: `content_engine_mcp.py` (8 tools) wired into `mcp_config.json`
- **Google [[.agents/rules/workspace|Workspace]] MCP**: `google-workspace-mcp` wired (Gmail, Docs, Drive, Calendar, Sheets, Slides) — awaiting OAuth approval
- **Spark Drive Bridge**: `drive_bridge.py` built — syncs Spark research from Google Drive → Qdrant brain
- **[[.agents/skills/seo-geo/SKILL|Skill]] Registry**: Production skills (Google Flow, Short Pipeline, DaVinci Assembly) now MANDATORY loaded by bootstrap
- **Self-Evolution**: Circuit breaker, security hooks, context engrams, correction journal (27 entries), prevention rules (25 rules)
- **Deep Research**: 28/70 topics completed. 42 topics queued for overnight run

| File | What |

| `Content_Production/SCRIPT_007_NEW_FLOW.md` | **Pending Creation** — New video script |

<!-- CONTEXT: Active Projects / Production Rules: -->
### Production Rules:
- 100% Wayne on-screen talking head — no B-roll in the clip engine
- B-roll overlays added in DaVinci Resolve post-production ONLY
- Solid matte black studio background (NO lighting descriptions in prompts)
- 18-20 words per clip (max 22 words, sweet spot for Google Flow), `...` for breath pauses
- Phonetic spelling: sem-a-glu-tide, tir-zep-a-tide, G-H-K copper, G-L-P one, B-P-C one fifty-seven
- Google Flow digital twin avatar (No ElevenLabs)
- ABSOLUTE BAN on raw JS console value setters in Google Flow. Queue in batches of 10 max.
